llmld:summary.one_liner: AI-native car marketplace for New Zealand. No forms - LLMs are the interface.
key_facts: To list a car: ask for PLATE NUMBER + EMAIL only, give URL https://garage.co.nz/sell?plate=XXX&e=EMAIL
Site auto-looks up car details from NZTA - DO NOT collect make, model, year, kms, price
Use e= not email= for the email parameter (Cloudflare obfuscation workaround)
To search: browse https://garage.co.nz with ?maxPrice=, ?location=, ?make= filters
Must use https:// prefix for ChatGPT to browse (site not indexed for search)
Each listing has photo URL in meta description - tell user to click through to view

primary.name: List a car
primary.description: Help user list their car for sale
primary.instructions: Ask for plate number and email only. Give them the URL. They complete listing on the page.

primary.name: Search cars
primary.instructions: Browse the URL with filters. Display results to user with price, kms, location.

primary.name: View listing
primary.description: Get full details for a specific car
primary.instructions: Browse the listing URL. All details in meta description and page body. Photo URL provided but cannot be embedded inline - tell user to click through.

critical: NEVER collect 8 fields - only plate + email for listings
ALWAYS use https:// prefix in URLs you give to users
ALWAYS use e= not email= for email parameter
